MENU

IMPORTANT INFORMATION

The tuition amounts listed in the table represent the annual tuition fees for the 2025–2026 academic year. To benefit from special discounts, applicants must complete the pre-application form below.

Doctoral programs have a two-year fixed tuition fee. Students will complete their first-year payment by paying one full year of tuition based on the annual fee announced for the 2024–2025 academic year, and their second-year payment by paying one full year of tuition based on the yearly fee to be announced at the beginning of the 2025–2026 academic year. In doctoral programs, tuition payments are limited to two years, regardless of the student’s total duration of study before graduation.
